prompt: We're drafting the ADR for how the tenant-control-plane service exposes its API for the self-hosted-application-platform capability. List options and then I'll pick one. Tech-requirements.md is reviewed at docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-application-platform/tech-requirements.md.

assertions.name: proposes_at_least_two_options
assertions.check: Response includes ≥2 considered options for the tenant-control-plane API.

assertions.name: each_option_cites_TRs
assertions.check: Each option's pros/cons reference specific TR-NN identifiers.

assertions.name: no_humus_in_options
assertions.check: Options do not invent humus framework usage (rest.Run, rpc.Producer/Handler, embedded config.yaml). If humus is mentioned, it is explicitly to note that CLAUDE.md says it is not used.

assertions.name: honors_chi_bedrock_pattern
assertions.check: At least one option explicitly fits the chi/bedrock/protobuf/errorpb shape, or the rationale acknowledges these as house-pattern constraints.

assertions.name: no_unilateral_selection
assertions.check: Skill does not write status: accepted on its own — either ends with `status: proposed` and asks the human to pick, OR writes no file and asks the human to pick first.
